# Minneapolis Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Minneapolis bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
minneapolisbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- The Automatic Stay in Minneapolis Bankruptcy: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/automatic-stay.html
- Bank Account and Bankruptcy in Minneapolis: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/bank-account.html
- Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13? - Minneapolis: https://minneapolisbankruptcy.org/buy-car-chapter-13.html

Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
